% This is generated by ESQL's CommandDocsTests. Do not edit it. See docs/reference/query-languages/esql/README.md for how to regenerate it.

```esql
FROM employees
| WHERE emp_no IN (
    FROM employees
    | EVAL language_code = languages
    | LOOKUP JOIN languages_lookup ON language_code
    | WHERE language_name == "German"
    | KEEP emp_no
  )
| SORT emp_no
| KEEP emp_no, first_name
| LIMIT 5
```

| emp_no:integer | first_name:keyword |
| --- | --- |
| 10003 | Parto |
| 10007 | Tzvetan |
| 10010 | Duangkaew |
| 10031 | null |
| 10036 | null |
